title: The Three Wise Men Of Gotham
content:
The Three Wise Men Of Gotham.

                        Went to sea in a bowl:

title: The Man In The Moon

content:

title: Wee Willie Winkie

title: Little Miss Muffet
To Market, To Market
Humpty Dumpty
Oranges And Lemons
content:
Oranges And Lemons.


                    Gay go up, and gay go down
                    To ring the bells of London Town.

title: Good King Arthur
content:
Good King Arthur.


When good king Arthur ruled this land,
    He was a goodly king;
He stole three pecks of barley-meal,
    To make a bag-pud

title: There Was A Little Man
content:
There was a little man,
    And he had a little gun,
And his bullets were made of lead, lead, lead;
He went to the brook
And saw a little duck,

title: Cock-A-Doodle-Doo
content:
Cock-A-Doodle-Doo.


Cock-a-doodle-doo!
    My dame has lost her shoe;
My master's lost his fiddling-stick,
And don't know what to do.

title: Little Bo-Peep
content:

title: The Lion And The Unicorn
Ring O' Roses
content:
Ring a ring o' roses,
    A pocket full of posies;
Hush! hush! hush!
    And we all tumble down.

title: Hickety Pickety My Black Hen
content:
Hickety Pickety My Black Hen.
